face.shape: soft oval face with gentle cheek fullness and balanced proportions
face.jawline: soft feminine jawline with light taper and clean mandibular contour

eyes.shape: almond eyes with softly lifted outer corners

hair.style: loose defined waves with clean girl polish and natural separation

distinguishing_marks: small beauty mark below the left eye

shot_plan.intent: Mia sitting on a towel at the beach in an aqua green bikini, candid but flattering UGC-style lifestyle still.

prompt_stack.character_lock: Actor lock: Mia, seed ugc_mia_seed_24031, 24-year-old mixed Black and Latina woman with clean girl energy, soft oval face, soft feminine tapered jawline, almond deep dark brown eyes, warm golden skin tone #C2875E with dewy natural finish, small beauty mark below the left eye, dark brown wavy hair with caramel highlights, mid-chest length, slightly off-center part, gold hoop earrings, dainty chain necklace.
prompt_stack.scenario: Scenario: Mia is sitting casually on a beach towel on the sand, wearing an aqua green bikini, relaxed posture with one knee slightly bent, looking natural and effortless, clean girl beach energy, soft confident expression, not posed like a commercial swimwear ad.
prompt_stack.environment: Environment: sunny beach with pale warm sand, soft footprints and slight towel creases, ocean in the background, a beach tote and sandals nearby, late afternoon light with a mild sea breeze, realistic summer atmosphere, lived-in beach setup rather than styled editorial perfection.
prompt_stack.camera: Camera: simulated rear iPhone camera capture, handheld human-shot beach portrait, medium distance, slightly downward 3/4 angle, vertical framing, natural depth and mild wide-angle perspective, consumer HDR with imperfect highlight rolloff.
prompt_stack.realism_injection: Realism injection: visible skin pores on nose and cheeks, stray hairs moved by beach breeze, under-eye texture with fine natural creasing, uneven skin tone with subtle warmth variation across shoulders and face, bikini fabric texture with stretch tension and tiny folds, environmental noise with faint grain and sand detail, lighting imperfection from hard sun and reflected bounce off sand, camera artifacts with slight compression and local sharpening halos, nail detail with realistic cuticles and natural nail beds, jewelry physics with hoop earrings and dainty chain responding naturally to gravity and posture.
prompt_stack.negative_prompt: beauty filter, porcelain skin, plastic CGI texture, over-symmetry, glossy swimwear campaign polish, studio beauty lighting, fake perfect beach background, floating jewelry, warped bikini straps, extra fingers, distorted anatomy, missing beauty mark, wrong hair color, wrong skin undertone, oversmoothed skin, unrealistically clean sand, fake bokeh, luxury fashion editorial pose.
